items.name: augur
items.description: 🦉 Augur — 多智能体投资分析系统。13位虚拟投资大师独立分析，加权共识机制，Bloomberg风格Web仪表盘。

items.name: autopus-adk
items.description: Autopus-ADK is of the agents, by the agents. for the agents. Multi-model orchestration (consensus/pipeline/debate/fastest). Architecture-as-Code, Lore decision tracking, SPEC/EARS engine.

items.name: qwen-code
items.description: An open-source AI agent that lives in your terminal.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: sdd-riper
items.description: Lightweight AI Agent Harness for agentic coding: let strong models explore while humans steer with minimal specs, checkpoints, approval, validation, and reverse sync.

items.name: boxlite
items.description: Compute substrate for AI agents: lightweight enough to live on your laptop, elastic enough to scale into the cloud and unleash unlimited resources.

items.name: HiClaw
items.description: An open-source Collaborative Multi-Agent OS for transparent, human-in-the-loop task coordination via Matrix rooms.

items.name: gascity
items.description: Orchestration-builder SDK for multi-agent coding workflows

items.name: nexent
items.description: Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

items.name: vibe-remote
items.description: Your AI agent army, commanded from Slack/Discord/Telegram/Wechat/Lark. Stream Claude Code, OpenCode, or Codex in real-time — from anywhere.
